violations.text: Firm is not in compliance with the process authority's procedures that were submitted to RIDOH for the following. Establishment must comply with process authority's procedures that were submitted the RIDOH. The pH log records for jarred food products were recorded above the critical limit of 3.9. Establishment is not testing the water activity for jarred food items. Items (listed on embargo form) were embargoed and samples (items listed on embargo form) were collected to be tested at the RIDOH state laboratory. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
